---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: |
  A colleciton of teaching activities, including master courses, thesis supervision, and talks and lectures given on reproducibility research practices
listing:
  contents: 
    - "data-science/index.qmd"
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
